name: roadmap
description: Roadmap + backlog graph (PIs → sprints, deps, priorities, session estimates) with deterministic, disk/CPU/RAM-checked multi-session fanout. YAML is the source of truth; SLICES.md/BACKLOG.md are generated. Orient with /slice, capture erratic work with /backlog, refresh with /sync, bootstrap with /init, fan out concurrent sessions with /fanout.
